meta.name: Kapil Meena
meta.title: Full-Stack Developer & Cybersecurity Engineer
meta.tagline: Building at the intersection of performance and security

education.institution: Indian Institute of Information Technology, Bhopal
education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Information Technology

achievements: Leading web security initiatives and mentoring students in penetration testing and OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities.
Conducting hands-on workshops on Web Exploitation, Bug Bounty, and Secure Coding Practices.
Organizing CTF challenges and real-world vulnerability assessment sessions.
Reviewing web applications for security flaws and guiding remediation strategies.

projects.title: SitePulse
projects.subtitle: Full-Stack Website Uptime Monitoring & Failure Analysis Platform
projects.description: Built a production-grade uptime monitoring platform with automated DNS, SSL, and HTTP health checks, failure detection, and real-time uptime analytics dashboard. Deployed serverlessly on Vercel with PostgreSQL.).

projects.title: RangRage
projects.subtitle: College Paintball Championship Platform
projects.description: Full-stack event booking platform handling 300+ team registrations with zero downtime under high concurrent traffic. Real-time slot booking using Supabase Realtime — 42 slots filled within 30 seconds with zero double-bookings.

projects.title: MusicSync
projects.subtitle: Distributed Synchronized Playback System
projects.description: Distributed music-sync system where all clients pre-load full audio into RAM and play in perfect, frame-accurate sync. Implements NTP-style global clock synchronization with adaptive playback-rate correction (±1–3%) via Web Audio API.

projects.title: PrepWays
projects.subtitle: Mentorship & Exam Preparation Platform
projects.description: Mentorship and exam prep platform for NEET/JEE aspirants. Features secure login with personalized dashboards, Cashfree payment gateway integration, and automated email notifications for order confirmations.

projects.title: ShreePrasad
projects.subtitle: Temple Prasad Booking Platform
projects.description: Customized WooCommerce temple prasad booking platform with automated promotional workflows, email notifications, and full SEO optimization. Mobile-responsive and production-ready.

projects.title: Pralay Sentinels
projects.subtitle: Early Glacier Outburst Detection System
projects.description: Real-time web app to monitor glacier conditions and assess outburst risks. Built for Smart India Hackathon 2024 — features AI-based predictive models, OpenAI anomaly detection, and live sensor dashboards.

certifications.title: Certified Network Security Practitioner (CNSP)
certifications.description: Certification focused on network security fundamentals, penetration testing concepts, vulnerability assessment, and defensive security practices. Demonstrates practical understanding of securing network infrastructure and identifying security weaknesses.

certifications.title: Java Masterclass 2025: 130+ Hours of Expert Lessons
certifications.description: Comprehensive Java programming course covering core Java, object-oriented programming, data structures, multithreading, collections, and real-world application development with over 130 hours of hands-on lessons.

certifications.title: Master the Coding Interview: Data Structures + Algorithms
certifications.description: Focused on mastering data structures and algorithms for coding interviews, including arrays, trees, graphs, dynamic programming, recursion, and problem-solving strategies used in top tech companies.

certifications.title: Learn Ethical Hacking From Scratch
certifications.description: Covering penetration testing, network security, vulnerability assessment, and ethical hacking techniques. Gained hands-on experience in cybersecurity tools and real-world attack simulations.

certifications.title: Google Foundations of Cybersecurity
certifications.description: Cybersecurity principles, network security, risk management, and threat detection. Industry best practices and foundational skills essential for cybersecurity roles.
